06=Significant correction to prior quarterly assessment
99=None of the above
^=Blank (skip pattern) effective 10/01/2023
611 X0600B_CRCTN_PPS_CD X0600B_CRCTN_PPS_CD X0600B Correction PPS Reason for Assessment Code CHAR 2 The data in this column indicates the PPS (A0310B) code from the prior erroneous record to be modified or inactivated. 01=5-day scheduled assessment
02=14-day scheduled assessment
03=30-day scheduled assessment
04=60-day
